name: wasmatrix
description: SIMD-required WebAssembly matrix operations powered by AssemblyScript
author: ihasq

scripts.generate: npm run generate:component && npm run generate:adapter
scripts.build: npm run generate:component && npm run build:wasm && npm run build:ts && npm run build:dist
scripts.build:component: npm run generate:component && npm run build:wasm:component
scripts.build:debug: npm run generate && asc --config asconfig.json --target debug && npm run build:ts && node --import ./scripts/oxc-ts-register.mjs scripts/prepare-dist.ts build/wasmatrix.debug.wasm
scripts.build:component:debug: npm run generate:component && asc --config asconfig.component.json --target debug
scripts.test: npm run build && npm run build:component && node --import ./scripts/oxc-ts-register.mjs --test test/*.test.ts
scripts.coverage: npm run build && npm run build:component && c8 --reporter=lcov --reports-dir=coverage node --import ./scripts/oxc-ts-register.mjs --test test/*.test.ts
